projects.summary: Development of the Central-West Orana Renewable Energy Zone, including significant new HV transmission infrastructure (lines and substations) and associated generation projects (solar, wind, BESS). Multiple tenders are active for network components and generation. High opportunity for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear FAT and inspection.

Building the network infrastructure for the Hunter-Central Coast REZ, involving new high-voltage transmission lines, multiple new substations, and upgrades to existing grid connections. Tenders for major works, including HV transformers and switchgear, are active or imminent.

Developing the New England REZ, including new backbone transmission infrastructure and a portfolio of generation projects. While some generation projects are awarded, specialist sub-packages for HV equipment within substations and transmission lines are ongoing or imminent. Includes significant HV transformers, GIS, and circuit breakers.

A critical high-voltage transmission interconnector project to increase transfer capacity between Victoria and New South Wales. Involves extensive new transmission lines and substations, requiring major procurement of HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear. Project is in the planning phase with regulatory approvals ongoing; main tenders are not expected before 2027.

Development of a new undersea and underground HVDC interconnector. While major works contracts have been awarded, specialist sub-packages for HV equipment, converter stations, substations, HV transformers, and switchgear are ongoing or imminent. Significant opportunities for FAT and inspection.

projects.projectName: Port Augusta Renewable Energy Hub (Battery Expansion)
projects.summary: Expansion of the existing Port Augusta battery energy storage system (BESS). The project involves additional power conversion systems, transformers, and grid connection equipment. FAT and inspection opportunities for new HV switchgear and transformers associated with the expansion are imminent.

Large-scale pumped hydro energy storage project. While main construction is underway, specialist sub-packages for final HV equipment, including transformers, switchgear for substations, and commissioning inspection, are anticipated over the next 12-18 months for grid connection and plant operations.

projects.projectName: Western Downs Green Power Hub Battery
projects.summary: Construction of a 200 MW / 400 MWh BESS co-located with the existing solar farm. Requires new transformers, switchgear, and grid connection infrastructure for the battery. Opportunities for HV equipment FAT and inspection are imminent as construction progresses.

projects.projectName: Goyder South Stage 2 Wind Farm & BESS
projects.summary: Second stage of the Goyder South project, comprising a large wind farm and co-located BESS. Will require extensive new grid connection infrastructure, including substations, HV transformers, and switchgear. Procurement for these major components is expected to commence within the next 6-18 months.

A new 275kV transmission line and associated substation to unlock renewable energy potential in North Queensland. Construction is underway, with ongoing procurement for high-voltage equipment, including transformers, switchgear, and control systems, representing immediate FAT and inspection opportunities.

projects.projectName: MacIntyre Wind Farm Renewable Energy Hub (Transmission)
projects.summary: Development of 300km of new 330kV transmission lines and substations to connect the MacIntyre Wind Farm to the grid. While the overall project is well into construction, specialist sub-packages for HV equipment, including large transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS, for new substations are still being procured and installed, offering active FAT and inspection opportunities.

Multi-stage battery energy storage system (BESS) project at the Eraring power station site. Phase 1 (50MW) is largely complete, but subsequent larger phases (up to 700MW) are under active construction and procurement. This includes significant HV components like transformers, switchgear, and grid connection infrastructure for which specialist sub-packages are open or imminent.

A large-scale System Strength and Inertia Service (SSIS) battery project designed to act as a 'super battery'. Construction is underway, with ongoing installation and commissioning of HV equipment, including grid connection transformers and switchgear for the battery. Opportunities for FAT, QAQC, and commissioning inspection are active.

Development of new transmission lines and substations to connect the large Clarke Creek Wind Farm to the grid. Construction is ongoing, with specialist sub-packages for HV equipment, including major transformers and switchgear, still in procurement and installation phases. Active FAT and inspection opportunities.

Expansion of the Kwinana Battery, adding 200 MW / 800 MWh of storage capacity. Construction is underway, with specialist procurement for power electronics, transformers, and switchgear for grid connection ongoing, presenting opportunities for FAT and inspection.

New 330kV interconnector between NSW and SA. While main construction is advanced, the project is still undergoing significant installation and commissioning of HV substations, including numerous HV transformers and GIS. There are ongoing needs for FAT, QAQC surveillance, and commissioning inspection of these critical components.

A proposed hyperscale data centre requiring significant new grid connection and substation infrastructure. This will involve large-scale HV transformers and switchgear for connection to the high-voltage network. Procurement for these components is anticipated in the next 6-18 months as designs are finalized.

Green hydrogen production facility requiring significant power input. This project will involve new high-voltage grid connections and associated electrical infrastructure, including transformers and switchgear, to power its electrolysers. Procurement for these components is expected within the next 12-18 months.

Development of new 275kV transmission lines and substations to connect the Kaban Wind Farm. Construction is advanced, but installation and commissioning of final HV equipment, including transformers and switchgear, are ongoing, creating opportunities for specialist inspection services.

A large-scale green hydrogen and ammonia production facility, requiring significant renewable energy input and associated high-voltage grid infrastructure. New substations, HV transformers, and switchgear will be required for power supply, with procurement for these items anticipated from late 2025.

Proposed large-scale wind farm requiring new substation and connection to the existing 330kV transmission network. This will involve the procurement of new HV transformers and switchgear. EPC tenders and associated equipment procurement are expected in the next 6-18 months.

Proposed wind farm requiring a new on-site substation and a connection line to the grid. This involves significant HV electrical infrastructure, including transformers and switchgear. Procurement for these components is anticipated as the project moves into the detailed design and financing stages.

Large-scale hybrid solar, wind, and battery project planned for North Queensland. The project will require substantial grid connection infrastructure, including new substations, HV transformers, and switchgear. Early-stage procurement for these components is expected in late 2025 or early 2026.

Proposed wind farm with integrated battery storage. Requires new transmission infrastructure, including a new substation to connect to the 330kV network. This will involve the procurement of large HV transformers and switchgear. Procurement for these major electrical components is anticipated to commence in 2025.

Proposed large-scale solar PV project requiring a new substation and connection to the transmission network. This will involve procurement of HV transformers and switchgear for the grid connection, with tenders for these components expected in late 2024 or early 2025.

Large solar farm with co-located BESS currently under construction. Includes a new 330kV substation and connection infrastructure. Specialist sub-packages for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and other substation equipment for the grid connection are ongoing or imminent, providing active FAT and inspection opportunities.

Massive proposed green hydrogen production facility powered by dedicated renewable energy sources. This will necessitate extensive new high-voltage grid infrastructure, including substations, HV transformers, and switchgear for power supply and grid connection. Early procurement for these components is anticipated from late 2024 / early 2025.

Proposed solar farm with battery storage near Uralla. Requires a new substation and dedicated connection to the high-voltage transmission network. This will involve the procurement of HV transformers and switchgear, with major tenders expected in the next 6-12 months.

Proposed large-scale hybrid renewable energy park (solar, wind, BESS) requiring extensive new high-voltage transmission infrastructure and substations for grid connection. Procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and other grid components is anticipated from early 2025.

Mega-scale integrated renewable energy project within the New England REZ, comprising multiple wind and solar farms, BESS, and extensive dedicated transmission lines and substations. Early-stage procurement for HV grid components is expected to begin in 2025/2026.

Plexus Renewables has multiple solar and battery projects in development across Australia, often requiring new substations and grid connections. While individual project stages vary, their portfolio collectively represents ongoing opportunities for HV equipment (transformers, switchgear) procurement and associated services as projects progress towards FID and construction.

Proposed large-scale battery energy storage system (BESS) co-located with an existing solar farm, requiring new HV connection infrastructure. This includes new transformers and switchgear for substation works. Procurement for these components is anticipated in late 2024 or early 2025.

Proposed large-scale solar farm with optional battery storage. Requires a new substation and grid connection to the 330kV network, involving significant HV transformers and switchgear. Procurement for major components is expected within the next 6-18 months.

Combined concentrated solar power (CSP) and battery storage project. Will require a significant grid connection, including new substation, HV transformers, and switchgear. Procurement for these major electrical components is still in the early planning stages.

projects.location: States of Bahia, Minas Gerais, Espírito Santo
projects.summary: Includes construction of 319 km of new 500 kV transmission lines and associated substations across multiple states. Main concession awarded in Q2 2024. Procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, GIS, and other substation equipment is imminent or active. High priority for FAT and inspection services.

Construction of 122 km of 500 kV transmission lines and associated new substations in Minas Gerais. Main concession awarded in Q2 2024. Active procurement for HV substation equipment including transformers, switchgear, and control systems. Strong opportunities for FAT and inspection.

Large-scale solar PV complex under construction. Requires a new substation and high-voltage grid connection. Specialist procurement packages for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear for the substation and grid connection are active or imminent, offering FAT and inspection opportunities.

Large wind farm project currently in advanced planning after securing PPAs. EPC tender, including procurement for the new substation and grid connection infrastructure (HV transformers, switchgear), is expected in the next 6-12 months.

projects.projectName: Serra do Mel III Solar Complex
projects.summary: Solar PV complex under construction, requiring new substation and high-voltage grid connection. Specialist sub-packages for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and other substation components are active or imminent, providing opportunities for FAT and inspection.

Proposed solar farm with integrated battery storage. Will require a new substation and grid connection infrastructure, including HV transformers and switchgear. EPC procurement is expected to commence in early 2025.

projects.projectName: São João do Piauí Wind Complex
projects.summary: Proposed wind farm in Piauí, requiring new substation and grid connection infrastructure. Procurement for HV transformers and switchgear for the grid connection is expected in late 2025 or early 2026.

Expansion of the Janaúba solar complex. New phases will require additional grid connection infrastructure, including substations, HV transformers, and switchgear. Procurement for these components is anticipated in late 2024 or early 2025.

Wind complex under construction. Requires new substation and high-voltage grid connection. Specialist sub-packages for HV transformers, circuit breakers, and other substation equipment are active or imminent, providing strong FAT and inspection opportunities.

Upcoming major transmission auction planned for Q4 2024 or early 2025, which will award concessions for significant new HV transmission lines and substations across Brazil. This will lead to substantial procurement of HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear from 2025 onwards.

Proposed hyperscale data centre requiring a dedicated new high-voltage grid connection and substation infrastructure. This will involve the procurement of large HV transformers and switchgear to ensure reliable power supply. Procurement for these components is anticipated in the next 6-18 months.
